quranicRelevance: Forgetting covenants, neglecting guidance, and being forgotten by God.
figurativeOrRareUsages: فَنَسِيَ وَلَمْ نَجِدْ لَهُ عَزْمًا (20:115): But he forgot/neglected, and We found not in him determination (of Adam).
discardedNoise: Postponing a sacred month (النسيء) - distinct root etymology (n-s-a).
Linguistic differences in the root letters.
summaryEn: The root denotes forgetfulness and omission, describing human error in forgetting covenants and the spiritual state of oblivion.
summaryAr: يدل هذا الجذر على النسيان والإهمال، واصفاً السهو البشري في نسيان المواثيق وحال الغفلة والذهول.
rawText: نسى 1 , aor. ﹻ, (Mgh, Msb,) inf. n. نَشْفٌ, (Msb,) He took [or absorbed] the water from the ground, (Mgh, Msb,) or from a pool, (Mgh,) with a piece of rag or some other thing (Mgh, Msb) of a similar kind. (Msb.)
